result.stdout:
Usage: dotnet-mbdiscid [OPTIONS] [DEVICE]

Available Options:
  -info       Do not try to read any table of contents, show basic info only.
  -launch     Launch the submission URL after showing the information.
  -noisrc     Disable reading of track ISRC values.
  -nomcn      Disable reading of the media catalog number.
  -notext     Disable reading of CD-TEXT info.
  -trace      Enable trace output.
  -version    Show version information.
  -help, -?   Show this list of options.

commands.payload:

  -trace      Enable trace output.
  -version    Show version information.
  -help, -?   Show this list of options.
